system_description: Conversational inputs trigger state_perturbations that activate data_representations and perform projection, traversal, retrieval, and inference synthesis operations

latent_space.description: Present, potential, inactive data_representations available to be made active_state

primary_corpus.description: A durable copy of the full Obsidian vault content available to the system
content: any other content I wish to be in the latent_space
structure: .md notes in an Obsidian vault
file structure and path topology are treated as semantically meaningful
note frontmatter is treated as semantic metadata
wiki links are treated as graph edges while notes are nodes

corpus_nodes.description: Derived semantic chunks produced from the primary_corpus
structure: chunks are broken down by Markdown structure
chunks preserve section ordinals
chunks retain references to note frontmatter
chunks retain references to note path topology
chunks retain references to source note identity
chunk_id = stable identifier derived from note identity + section ordinal + optional content hash

vector_index_surface.description: Embedding-backed representation of corpus_nodes and promoted synthetic_nodes
structure: support semantic similarity search
support contextual neighbor identification
support activation of candidate semantic regions
each vector record must retain linkage to the source chunk_id and source note identity (SQLite FTS, Tantivy, Whoosh, ripgrep, BM25, etc.)

lexical_index_surface.description: Lexical search representation of corpus_nodes and promoted synthetic_nodes
structure: support keyword search
support exact phrase matching
support hybrid retrieval alongside vector search
type of lexical index must support exact and keyword retrieval over chunk text and selected metadata

graph_layer.description: Relation surface initially derived from Obsidian-native structure - should be possible to extract from Obsidian with script

synthetic_nodes.description: Persisted synthesis artifacts created from conversational perturbations and promoted back into the data substrate.
structure: written md note in primary corpus with frontmatter_tag identification
indexed chunk
lexical record
stored vector embedding

runtime_flow.description: User enters a message into a conversation_thread.
Runtime loads the current materialized thread_state from the conversation_thread.
User input is parsed in isolation, then salted with prior_thread_state to project the semantic target for this perturbation.
Semantic targets activate candidate regions of latent_space across available data representations.
Activated regions are expanded into candidate neighborhoods and organized into a traversal manifest.
Concrete content is retrieved from latent_space using the semantic_traversal_manifest.
Retrieved material is checked against the semantic_coverage_target before synthesis.
Runtime assembles the fresh LLM call context from user_input, prior_thread_state, traversal, retrieval, and coverage artifacts.
A fresh LLM call produces the user-facing response from the synthesis_context_packet.
Runtime materializes the next thread_state from the prior state, user input, perturbation artifacts, and assistant response.
Runtime appends a hash-chained perturbation record to the thread_ledger.
Selected synthesis output may be intentionally promoted back into latent_space.

latent_space.description: Present, potential, inactive data_representations available to be made active_state

components: proper indexing and plumbing/routing to latent_space for outputs of this state
chunk_embed_store.input: user content, Markdown for now, will incorporate multimodal after initial system working

user_input.description: The user message or request that provides immediate, contextually semantic pressure triggering a state_perturbation (traversal, retrieval, and synthesis)
user_input.output: conversationally contextualized semantic node(s) with target benchmark for coverage

active_state.description: The currently focused state in the active_conversation

conversation_thread.description: a single session identifier linking together previous active states from a specific initial user message to an active_state
components: serialized compression of previous active states - blockchain type shi? - emitting a contextual_salt
conversation_thread.input: user_input and context_salt into a specific conversation_thread active_state

context_salt.description: semantic compression of previous active_state(s) in a conversation_thread feeding perturbations
context_salt.output: recurrent_state is active_state after it becomes available to the next turn

state_perturbation.description: The complete state transition process triggered by user_input against session_state_kernel or recurrent_state

semantic_coverage_target.description: A provisional benchmark for determining whether the semantic region activated by user_input and active_state has enough coverage to proceed
semantic_coverage_target.derivation: contextual_salt from active_conversation projects semantic_extraction into a coverage matrix
current_scope: retrieval sufficiency for the current perturbation
non_scope: directly constraining the final synthesis style
forcing synthesis into a narrow deterministic score
semantic_coverage_target.working_hypothesis: Coverage may eventually estimate whether activated nodes, overlapping semantic regions, contained regions, and bridging edges cover enough of the relevant convex semantic region to proceed
semantic_coverage_target.boundary: coverage_benchmark is intentionally provisional and should not block early implementation

latent_space_traversal.description: Activates candidate semantic surfaces within latent_space based on active_state
latent_space_traversal.boundary: Traversal identifies and organizes candidates It does not itself synthesize the answer

retrieval.description: Retrieves concrete content from latent_space using semantic_traversal_manifest
retrieval.boundary: Retrieval selects and packages source material It does not itself create the synthesis

llm_synthesis.description: Synthesizes retrieved content against active_state to produce a conversational output or structured artifact
llm_synthesis.boundary: The synthesis is the target output of the constrained process It should preserve provenance and retrieval basis without being over-constrained by a direct synthesis metric

state_update.description: Updates the conversational thread state after synthesis

synthetic_node_promotion.description: Optionally persists selected synthesis output back into the data substrate
synthetic_node_promotion.boundary: Not every synthesis_output becomes a synthetic_node Promotion is an intentional write-back operation

kernel_context_packet.description: Initial context packet for bootstrapping a new conversational thread

semantic_context_packet.description: Structured extraction of user_input semantics and relevant recurrent_state context

semantic_traversal_manifest.description: Manifest of activated nodes, candidate neighbors, graph expansions, and retrieval targets

retrieval_packet.description: Concrete retrieved material selected from latent_space for the current perturbation

synthesis_output.description: The conversational or structured output produced from active_state and retrieval_packet

updated_recurrent_state.description: The thread-local state carried forward after the perturbation completes

synthetic_node.description: A promoted synthesis artifact written back into latent_space

implementation_boundary.first_build_target: A conversational state space over Obsidian notes where each chat thread maintains its own recurrent_state and each user message triggers a bounded state_perturbation
implementation_boundary.initial_graph_strategy: Extract Obsidian wiki links, note nodes, chunk containment edges, path topology, and selected frontmatter values before attempting a richer ontology
implementation_boundary.initial_write_back_strategy: Only promoted synthesis snippets become synthetic_nodes in latent_space
